objective: Add Command readback coverage allowing final response only after zero ready nodes and met lease minimums.
acceptance_criteria: Command compact timeline records ready nodes and node completion status
Command compact timeline records min_minutes and min_minutes_met
Command final response remains denied while ready nodes remain even when min_minutes is met
Command final response remains denied when all nodes are complete but min_minutes is unmet
node 20 readback continues to node 21 while ready nodes remain
